subject: Kikaonde
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Yonse misango yanema mukuleta ne kukwasha kulama kisemwa,mpito ne byonse
topics: byaitabilwamo bangikazhi ne paimena mashimikila a kisho.
Mingilo ya bipanyi bya misango ya biñambwañambwa ilondololwe bulongo.
Kuswisha mingilo ya misango ya biñambwañambwa.
